framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.est: 1-2/day declining (IRGC baseline), ★★★ BUSHEHR NUCLEAR PERIMETER HIT Apr 4 (1 killed, IAEA confirmed no radiation rise); Mahshahr Petrochemical Zone STRUCK Apr 4 = energy infrastructure targeting NOW ACTIVE; F-15E+A-10 shot down Apr 3 CONFIRMED; WSO STILL MISSING; Trump '48 hours before all hell'; 3 INDEPENDENT fronts sustained
history.note: Day 49. ★★★★★ BUSHEHR NUCLEAR THRESHOLD + PETROCHEMICAL STRIKES: (1) ★★★ BREAKING: Projectile struck PERIMETER of Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant Apr 4 — 1 worker killed (Tasnim/IAEA/NYT/AJE); IAEA confirmed no radiation increase; Iran informed IAEA; (2) ★★★ Mahshahr Petrochemical Special Economic Zone STRUCK Apr 4 — multiple explosions, smoke rising across zone (AJE/NYT/Fars); (3) US/Israel now targeting petrochemical+nuclear-adjacent infrastructure BEFORE Apr 6 power plant deadline; (4) F-15E Strike Eagle (494th FS) + A-10 Warthog BOTH shot down Apr 3 = FIRST US aircraft losses; WSO STILL MISSING (NYT/WaPo/CBS); (5) IRGC baseline STILL 1-2/day declining; (6) Iran fired missiles at Israel Apr 3 (HT); (7) Trump: '48 hours before all hell' (Sky News) WHILE postponing power plant strikes 5 more days; (8) CENTCOM Wk5+: 12,300+ sites struck; (9) US KIA: 13-15 confirmed + hundreds wounded (NYT); (10) Iran: 2,076+ killed, 26,500 wounded (AJE Apr 3). ★★★ CRITICAL: Petrochemical strikes + Bushehr perimeter = energy targeting HAS BEGUN before official Apr 6 deadline. 3 INDEPENDENT fronts (IRGC residual, Houthis sustained, Hezbollah 5K+). Source: NYT/AJE/IAEA/Tasnim/Fars/Sky/WaPo/CBS/HT

history.note: Day 50. ★★★★★ NUCLEAR PERIMETER + PETROCHEMICAL INFRASTRUCTURE TARGETED: (1) Apr 4: Explosions at Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant auxiliary building + Mahshahr Special Petrochemical Zone (Wikipedia/AJE/NYT); 1 worker killed at Bushehr perimeter; IAEA confirmed no radiation increase; (2) CENTCOM Wk5+: ~6,000 targets struck in Op Epic Fury (AJE/CENTCOM); (3) IRGC baseline STILL 1-2/day declining; Apr 2 joint Iran+Houthi+Hezbollah salvo at Israel = coordinated show-of-force; (4) F-15E Strike Eagle (494th FS) + A-10 Warthog BOTH shot down Apr 3 = FIRST US aircraft losses; pilot rescued, WSO MISSING; Iran offered $60K reward for WSO; (5) Houthis SUSTAINED — 4+ attacks on Israel since entering war Mar 28, joint BM+drones; warned of Bab el-Mandeb closure; (6) Hezbollah 5,000+ attacks since Mar 2 — 71 attacks targeting Israel Mar 31-Apr 1 alone; shot down IAF drone; INDEPENDENT front; (7) US KIA: 15 confirmed + hundreds wounded; Pentagon accused of coverup (Intercept); (8) Iran: 7,007+ deaths (HRANA); (9) Trump '48 hours before all hell' WHILE postponing power plant strikes 5 days; (10) ★★★ CRITICAL: Energy/nuclear infrastructure targeting NOW ACTIVE before official Apr 6 deadline. 3 INDEPENDENT fronts (IRGC residual, Houthis sustained, Hezbollah 5K+). Iran AD PROVEN NOT eliminated (F-15E+A-10 losses). Source: Wikipedia/AJE/CENTCOM/NYT/Intercept/IAEA/Bloomberg

history.est: ~3-5 mbd (5-8 ships/day INCREMENTALLY INCREASING), ★★★ FIRST WESTERN TRANSITS Apr 3: French CMA CGM Kribi + Japanese tanker; 3 Omani tankers via NEW coast bypass; Iran grants 'essential goods' passage (CNN Apr 4); UNSC Hormuz vote delayed next week; Iran Larak checkpoint+USD2M toll enforced; still 95%+ below pre-crisis
history.note: Day 49. ★★★★★ WESTERN CRACKS + ESSENTIAL GOODS EXPANSION: (1) ★★★ CNN Apr 4: Iran grants passage for vessels carrying 'essential goods' through Hormuz — criteria unclear but SIGNAL of incremental opening (Tasnim); (2) French CMA CGM Kribi (Maltese-flagged) transited Hormuz EASTBOUND Apr 3 = FIRST Western European vessel since war (Bloomberg/Reuters/Guardian/UPI/SCMP); (3) Japanese-owned tanker also crossed (Bloomberg); (4) 3 Omani tankers via NEW Oman coast bypass route (Bloomberg); (5) UNSC Hormuz vote DELAYED to next week — Bahrain resolution watered down to 'defensive only' (AP/DW); China/Russia oppose force; (6) Iran-Oman permanent monitoring protocol still drafting (NYT/CNBC); (7) Iran Larak checkpoint operating — IRGC vets+escorts, USD2M toll, yuan+crypto; (8) Friendly-nation list EXPANDED: PH/MY/TH (after CN/RU/IN/IQ/PK); (9) USNI Apr: 'US has NOT undertaken naval escorts' — 5+ weeks unfulfilled; Tripoli LHA-7 arrived, Boxer LHD-4 racing to join; (10) ~2,190+ vessels waiting west of Hormuz. PATTERN: Incremental EXPANSION (Western+Oman bypass+essential goods) but still 95%+ below pre-crisis 150/day. Source: CNN/Tasnim/Bloomberg/Reuters/Guardian/UPI/SCMP/AP/DW/USNI

history.est: ~4-6 mbd (8-12 ships/day INCREASING), Bloomberg Apr 4: weekly transits at HIGHEST since war began; FIRST WESTERN TRANSITS: French CMA CGM Kribi + Japanese tanker crossed Apr 3; 3 Omani tankers via NEW coast bypass; Philippines+France+Japan added to passage list; Iran grants 'essential goods' passage; UNSC Hormuz vote delayed next week; Iran Larak checkpoint+USD2M toll STILL enforced; still ~93% below pre-crisis
history.note: Day 50. ★★★★★ TRANSIT INCREMENTALLY RISING — BLOOMBERG: HIGHEST SINCE WAR: (1) ★★★ Bloomberg Apr 4: Weekly transits reach HIGHEST since war began — more vessels crossing including those with no clear links to Iran or China (Bloomberg); (2) French CMA CGM Kribi (Maltese-flagged) transited EASTBOUND Apr 3 = FIRST Western European vessel since war (Bloomberg/Reuters/UPI/Guardian); (3) Japanese-owned tanker also crossed (Bloomberg); (4) Philippines added Apr 2 (UPI Apr 3); France+Japan de facto allowed; (5) 3 Omani tankers via NEW Oman coast bypass route BYPASSING Iranian corridor (Bloomberg); (6) UNSC Hormuz vote DELAYED to next week — Bahrain resolution watered down to 'defensive only' (AP/DW); China opposes force; (7) Iran Larak checkpoint operating — IRGC vets+escorts each ship, USD2M toll, yuan/crypto; (8) Iran-Oman drafting PERMANENT Hormuz 'monitoring' protocol = peacetime sovereignty bid (NYT/CNBC); (9) USNI Proceedings: US has NOT undertaken naval escorts — 5+ weeks; (10) Pre-crisis ~120 ships/day, current ~8-12/day = ~93% below pre-crisis BUT trend IMPROVING. PATTERN: Two-tier Hormuz regime EXPANDING — friendly nations+Western cracks+essential goods = incremental opening. Still far below pre-crisis. Source: Bloomberg/Reuters/UPI/Guardian/AP/DW/NYT/CNBC/USNI

q3_spr_release_rate.delivery_timeline: 120 days per DOE, first barrels end of W3

history.est: ~1-1.5 mbd (DOE/Wright), D+34, deliveries ACTIVE since Apr 1, 10M bbl Bryan Mound exchange RFP proposals due TOMORROW Apr 6, Gas USD4.08/gal national (AAA), CA USD5+; SPR declining to ~243M bbl (40yr low); DOE denies further releases
history.note: Day 49 D+34. ★★★★ SPR ACTIVE BUT APR 6 DOUBLE CONVERGENCE: (1) DOE 10M bbl Bryan Mound emergency EXCHANGE proposals due TOMORROW Apr 6 = SAME DAY as energy strike deadline (Reuters/DOE/FoxBusiness); (2) Rate confirmed 1-1.5 mbd (Wright/S&P Global); (3) SPR deliveries UNDERWAY since Apr 1 — Shell/Marathon/BP/Gunvor receiving; (4) Gas USD4.08/gal national (AAA) = highest since Aug 2022; CA USD5+ (NYT); (5) SPR projected to decline to ~243M bbl = near 40-year low (Grokipedia); (6) DOE FIRMLY DENIED further releases beyond current plan (WebProNews); (7) G7 coordinated 412M bbl (US 172M); (8) Brent USD112.42 (Fortune Apr 3); WTI USD111.29 — INVERTED above Brent (OilPrice); (9) Gold USD4,677-4,703 futures (Investing/LiteFinance); (10) SPR 1.5 mbd vs 15-17 mbd Hormuz disruption = 10% replacement. Apr 6 = Bryan Mound RFP close + energy infrastructure strike deadline + potential market shock Monday. Source: DOE/Reuters/FoxBusiness/AAA/Fortune/OilPrice/Investing

history.est: ~1-1.5 mbd (DOE/Wright), D+35, deliveries ACTIVE since Apr 1, 10M bbl Bryan Mound exchange RFP proposals due TOMORROW Apr 6, Gas USD4.08/gal national (AAA), CA USD5.89 (ChooseEnergy); SPR declining to ~243M bbl (40yr low); DOE denies further releases; Goldman warns 400M bbl 'may be insufficient'
history.note: Day 50 D+35. ★★★★ SPR ACTIVE BUT OVERWHELMED — APR 6 DOUBLE CONVERGENCE: (1) DOE Apr 1: 10M bbl emergency EXCHANGE from Bryan Mound — proposals due TOMORROW Apr 6 = SAME DAY as energy strike deadline (Reuters/DOE); (2) FoxBusiness Apr 3: US releases 10M bbl as oil tops USD112 — critics warn drawdown 'could fuel vulnerabilities'; Goldman Sachs warns 400M bbl release 'may be insufficient' to cover Hormuz disruption (FoxBusiness); (3) Rate confirmed 1-1.5 mbd (Wright/S&P Global); (4) SPR deliveries UNDERWAY since Apr 1 — Shell/Marathon/BP/Gunvor receiving; (5) Gas USD4.08/gal national (AAA/USAToday Apr 2) = highest since Aug 2022; CA USD5.89 (ChooseEnergy Apr 1); (6) SPR projected to decline to ~243M bbl = near 40-year low; (7) DOE DENIES further releases beyond current plan; (8) G7 coordinated 412M bbl (US 172M); (9) Brent USD112.42 (Fortune Apr 3); WTI USD111.29 — INVERTED above Brent (OilPrice); (10) Exchange structure: companies repay 20% more barrels Nov 2026-Sep 2028. SPR 1.5 mbd vs 15-17 mbd Hormuz disruption = 10% replacement. Source: Reuters/DOE/FoxBusiness/AAA/USAToday/ChooseEnergy/Fortune/OilPrice

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: Action-only: Gas USD4.08-4.12/gal; US casualties 15+ KIA; War Powers resolution gaining House support but not yet decisive

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
